title: tetradium glabrifolium var. glaucum
intro: Tetradium glabrifolium var. glaucum, also known as Chinese pepper or Evodia, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The medicinal properties of Tetradium glabrifolium var. glaucum include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever, and reduce pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Tetradium glabrifolium var. glaucum can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
